name: tatu-financeiro
description: Um software de controle de contas moderno e intuitivo.

scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp index.html public/index.html && esbuild index.tsx --bundle --format=esm --outfile=public/bundle.js --jsx=automatic --external:react --external:react-dom/client --external:@google/genai --external:recharts --external:framer-motion --define:process.env.API_KEY='"'$API_KEY'"'
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx -y serve public -p 3000
